How It Works

Simple. Flexible. Built around your life in Perth.

Three steps to building a genuine flexible income through travel alongside family life in Perth and Perthshire.

01

Join The Platform

Get access to exclusive member rates on holidays, flights, hotels and experiences. Start saving on your own family travel immediately.

02

Share With Others

When friends, family or your network in Perth join through you, you earn. No cold calling. Just genuine conversations about something that works.

03

Build Residual Income

As your network grows so does your income. It works during the school run, on holiday, and while you sleep.

"We are just a normal family from Tayside. In October 2024 we made a decision that changed everything. In February 2027 we are leaving the UK to travel the world with our kids."
Kevin and Sam, Made To Travel, Dundee
Our Story

We are not travel experts. We are parents who made a decision.

In October 2024, after a difficult period in business, we discovered a travel platform that genuinely changed our financial picture. We started saving thousands on family holidays and building residual income at the same time.

Now we work with mums, teachers and everyday people across Perth, Angus and Dundee who want the same freedom. We share everything we know and are with you every step of the way.

If you are a mum in Perth who feels like life should offer more, this could be the conversation that changes everything.

Start The Conversation

Your Questions Answered

Do I need experience in travel or business?
None at all. We had no travel industry background when we started. Full training and support is provided from day one.
How much time does it take each week?
Many of our partners across Perth start with just a few hours a week around family life. The platform works when you do.
Is this a pyramid scheme or MLM?
No. This is a genuine travel platform with real products people use and love. You earn by sharing something that saves people money on holidays.
How do I find out more without any pressure?
Simply send us a DM on Instagram. We have a relaxed conversation and if it feels right we invite you to our weekly online information session.
Can I meet you in person near Perth?
Yes. We run a free weekly Coffee Stop Drop In every Wednesday from 9am to 10.30am at Costa Coffee Monifieth, Dundee. Easy to reach from Perth. No booking needed.

Ready to have a real conversation?

No pitch. No pressure. Just an honest chat about whether this could work for your family in Perth.
